markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and growth goals for Nic's company with GrowthX.ai team.](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ambitious traffic goals: 100k visitors by end of Q2, though likely unrealistic in timeframe](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Target audience: CTOs, VPs/Heads of ML/Data Science; focus on marketplaces, social media, e-commerce](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Current content strategy: research article summaries + pillar content (20 posts/pillar), publishing 5/week](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Key challenges: limited public info on niche, AI hallucinations, highly technical audience averse to fluff](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)

## Topics

### Growth Goals and Expectations

  - [Tully (colleague) set ambitious goal: 100k visitors by end of Q2 (June)](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Current traffic mainly branded searches; big growth opportunity in non-branded](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Kyle (GrowthX): Goals extremely aggressive; typical growth more gradual](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
      - [Early: 20-50 clicks/week](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Month 3: 150-200+ clicks/week](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [100k visitors usually seen at 1+ year mark](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Small serviceable addressable market (SAM) for ML engineers needing recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)

### Target Audience and Segments

  - [Decision makers: CTO, Head/VP of ML, Head of Data Science](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Implementers: More junior versions of above roles](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Key segments:](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
    1.  Marketplaces (e.g., Airbnb, eBay)
    2.  Social media companies
    3.  E-commerce (Shopify integration)
    4.  Media platforms
  - [Focus: Personalization features (notifications, email campaigns, homepages, recommendations)](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

### Current Content Strategy

1.  Research article summaries:
      - [Recent research summarized by grad students](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [Posted on Webflow, Reddit, LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
2.  Pillar content:
      - [10-20 posts per pillar (connectors, competitors, use cases, models, features, datasets, metrics)](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [Human-edited, code snippets, images](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
      - [Publishing 5 posts/week (could potentially increase)](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
3.  Creative stream:
      - [Working with agency + graphic designer](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
      - [Developing infographics for social media](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

### Content Challenges and Considerations

  - [Limited public information on niche topic](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [AI-generated content often hallucinates/inaccurate](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Highly technical audience requires specificity, averse to fluff](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Webflow CMS limitations (e.g., code snippet formatting)](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Time-consuming manual processes for publishing/distribution](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

### Competitor Landscape

  - [Two main competitors (unnamed)](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Alternative: Building in-house recommendation systems](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Advantage: Immediate implementation vs. 2-year build time](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)

### GrowthX.ai Next Steps

1.  Conduct competitive research
2.  Develop content/SEO strategy in Airtable
3.  Present recommendations for content clusters and keywords
4.  Begin calibration process for style/format alignment

## Next Steps

  - [Nic: Share list of LinkedIn target roles](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Nic: Provide Tully's list of influential people in the space](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Nic: Share CMS access, GSC, GA details](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [GrowthX: Send detailed list of required information within 24 hours](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [GrowthX: Develop initial content strategy and SEO recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call for next week to review strategy](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Nic: Overshare information to help GrowthX team understand the space quickly](https://fathom.video/share/o-Z6263gTJhxq9_hVAE-FMM9dxQFVWjs?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
